vocab.example: I recently purchased a large floor mirror to enhance the interior decor of my living room.

vocab.meaning: khung được chạm trổ công phu
vocab.example: I have a weakness for vintage mirrors with an ornate frame that adds a touch of elegance to the wall.

vocab.meaning: tạo cảm giác không gian rộng hơn
vocab.example: The main reason I bought a mirror was to create an illusion of space in my somewhat cramped apartment.
A well-placed mirror can serve as a stunning focal point in an otherwise plain hallway.
I invested in a high-quality vanity mirror with built-in LED lighting for my bedroom.
I prefer mirrors with a beveled edge because they catch the light beautifully and look more sophisticated.
When shopping for a bathroom mirror, I specifically looked for a shatterproof version for safety reasons.

vocab.meaning: tôn lên/phù hợp với đồ nội thất
vocab.example: It took me a while to find a mirror that would perfectly complement the minimalist furniture in my studio.
I enjoy scouring every antique shop in the city hoping to find a mirror with a bit of history.
Buying a mirror is a very personal choice that depends entirely on one's individual aesthetic preference.
